payload.message: Run: cd ~/someboty-docs && git pull --rebase origin main && git add workspace-otto/memory/ workspace-otto/STATUS.md workspace-otto/MASTER_PLAN.md && git commit -m '[otto] nightly memory backup 2026-03-28T10:28:27Z' && git push origin main && echo 'Memory backup complete'

Post this exact message to Slack channel C0AFH2GKHV4 using the Slack API bot token from macOS keychain (security find-generic-password -a someboty -s slack-bot -w). Message: Run git log --oneline --since=24h ~/someboty-docs to get yesterday builds. Then post to #otto: BUILT: [commits]. STATUS: green/amber/red based on any cron errors. BLOCKING: nothing (or list blockers). Keep total under 300 chars. Use curl -s -X POST https://slack.com/api/chat.postMessage with Authorization Bearer [token].
cd ~/someboty-docs && git pull --rebase origin main && python3 workspace-otto/scripts/kos_promote.py
